case_title: LOVELACE, VANESSA VS EGO LINES MOVING & STORAGE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EGO LINES MOVING & STORAGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,112.30 FILED BY LOVELACE, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT EGO LINES MOVING & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVELACE, VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EGO LINES MOVING & STORAGE $418.42 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $483.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM INTERSTATE COMMERCE COMMISSION REGARDING SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM TO TOM BONVECHIO.
